## 🎯 PR Description

**Type of Change:**
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement

**Related Issue:**
Closes #(issue number)

**Summary:**
Brief description of what this PR accomplishes.

---

## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] No console.log or debug statements left
- [ ] Code is DRY (Don't Repeat Yourself)

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Code coverage maintained at 80%+
- [ ] All tests passing locally
- [ ] No test regressions

### Documentation
- [ ] Updated README if needed
- [ ] Added/updated API documentation
- [ ] Added inline code comments
- [ ] Updated requirements document if applicable

### Security
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Input validation added
- [ ] SQL injection prevention implemented
- [ ] No XSS vulnerabilities

### Database
- [ ] Database migrations created (if applicable)
- [ ] Schema changes backward compatible
- [ ] Tested with MySQL

### Performance
- [ ] No N+1 queries
- [ ] Optimized loops
- [ ] Appropriate indexes added

---

## 👥 Reviewers Notes

**Key Points for Reviewers:**
1. Review the changed files below
2. Check test coverage (80%+ required)
3. Verify security implications
4. Confirm performance impact
5. Validate database changes

**Questions for Reviewers:**
- Does the logic meet the requirements?
- Are there any edge cases not handled?
- Is the performance acceptable?
- Are there security concerns?
- Does this need documentation updates?
